title: felicia abyssinica var. neghelliensis
intro: Felicia abyssinica var. neghelliensis, also known as Neghelli Blue Felicia, is a variety of the Felicia abyssinica plant, a flowering plant native to East Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Neghelli Blue Felicia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which are believed to offer relief from various health conditions.
